textByHashes.76f7bd9436e31fe04d676eaf8254a1205e2a462f: Nilsal, iknami! Are you looking to get along the river?
textByHashes.a78d85760408bc147784f30e5fd0c5d092769f22: Where would you like to go?
textByHashes.d61ebada342a70b3ba6254e84d6b3ddcaf56b4d6: No worries. You know where to find me when you need me!
textByHashes.4c68f14b37b51f1a72e902cb95185de056a7b729: Currently, my service runs from here to Tal Teklan and then on to the Gloomthorn Trail on the edge of the Auburn Valley. I make the most of the river currents to move rapidly from point to point.
textByHashes.66f0414e096f46d3db2715f5c15cc89b8e041bcd: The best part is, I make enough money doing deliveries, so if you just want to travel, it's entirely free of charge!
textByHashes.831429762bc4a048905412e88fa7e4bf8b19ab28: Absolutely! Where would you like to go?
